name: Sun Shot
description: Shoot a ball of light in front of you that briefly stops before launching towards your opponent. Useful in combos and for checking opponents from a distance.

name: Sun Flare
description: Shoot a beam of light in front of you. Using the light version of this attack stocks a Sun Crest.

name: Solar Burst
description: While airborne, shoot a beam of light toward the ground. Using the light version of this attack stocks a Sun Crest.

name: Sun Rise
description: Unleash a spinning attack. Useful in combos or as an anti-air attack.

name: Sun Veil
description: Counter an opponent's attack and send them flying. Can also be used to absorb projectiles.

name: Vanishing Sun
description: Used to instantaneously warp to set distances. The medium and heavy versions will perform an attack after teleporting.

name: Shining Sun
description: Attack your opponent with a series of rising kicks. Consume a stocked Sun Crest to further boost its properties. This move is invincible on startup, making it a useful way to turn the tables.

name: Order of the Sun
description: Fire a beacon of light into the sky that rains back down as damaging projectiles. The strength of the move will determine its range of effect, and consuming a stocked Sun Crest will further boost its properties.

name: Cosmic Ray
description: Summon a sigil at your opponent's position that unleashes the power of the sun. Useful as a high-damage option in combos.

name: Sun Bright
description: An overhead attack that cannot be blocked while crouching.

name: Halo Flight
description: A forward-moving attack that can be canceled into aerial special moves.

name: Pretty Heel Kick
description: A two-hit combination attack that can be canceled into special moves.

name: Glowing Touch
description: A two-hit combination attack with long reach.

name: Luminous Uppercut
description: An attack that launches an opponent into the air if it connects. It can also be canceled into special moves.

name: Satellite Leap
description: A series of attacks performed while jumping.

name: Strange Knuckle
description: Stop your opponent in their tracks and send them flying forward with a savage blow to the face. Throws your opponent without switching places with them.

name: Gravity Drop
description: Use gravity to lift your opponent and toss them behind you. Throws your opponent while switching places with them.

name: Drive Impact: Twinkle Kick
description: Lunge forward with a powerful attack. Can be used to absorb an opponent's attack while launching your own offensive.

name: Drive Reversal: Odd Flight
description: Can be used after blocking an attack to quickly turn a defensive position into an offensive one. Can also be used when recovering from a knockdown. The input can be held while downed to perform this when rising.

name: Drive Parry
description: Adopt a stance that allows you to deflect all opponent strikes. This stance can be sustained by holding down the command used to activate it.

name: Parry Drive Rush
description: Immediately move forward from a Drive Parry stance. Normal or unique attacks performed while moving will have their properties changed.

name: Cancel Drive Rush
description: Immediately move forward out of an attack. Can be performed during any special-cancelable move.
